The '''Galactic Alliance Starfighter Corps''' was the reorganization of its [[New Republic Starfighter Corps/Legends|New Republic predecessor]]. Like the others before it, it was separate from the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|navy]] and held ranks similar to that of the [[Galactic Alliance Army|army]].
